description: This file defines a SelectorEngine utility for DOM element selection and traversal, including methods for finding elements, navigating ancestors, siblings, and focusable children, as well as extracting selectors from elements. It is part of Bootstrap's DOM utilities.

methods.name: find
methods.description: Finds all elements matching a selector within a given element or the document.

methods.name: findOne
methods.description: Finds the first element matching a selector within a given element or the document.

methods.name: children
methods.description: Returns child elements of a given element that match a selector.

methods.name: parents
methods.description: Returns all ancestor elements matching a selector.

methods.name: prev
methods.description: Returns previous sibling elements matching a selector.

methods.name: next
methods.description: Returns next sibling elements matching a selector.

methods.name: focusableChildren
methods.description: Returns focusable child elements within a given element.

methods.name: getSelectorFromElement
methods.description: Extracts a selector string from an element's data attributes and verifies its existence.

methods.name: getElementFromSelector
methods.description: Returns a DOM element matching the selector obtained from an element.

methods.name: getMultipleElementsFromSelector
methods.description: Returns multiple DOM elements matching the selector obtained from an element.
